degraded_reason: Single ready bead implemented directly by parent; independent Codex reviewer subagents used for review gate.
review_blocker_summary: Initial public-constructor review requested the frozen one-result New(config) constructor shape.
Initial config-semantics review requested ObservationError-compatible config, flush, and shutdown failures with ErrorHandler notification.
First config-semantics re-review requested retaining failed shutdown state for subsequent Shutdown and post-failed-shutdown Flush.
Updated Observer to use one-result New, normalize lifecycle/config errors, call ErrorHandler, enforce clean shutdown idempotence, and retain failed shutdown errors.
Focused re-reviews approved both blocker sets with no remaining blocking findings.
